---
title:  
    "Parallel evolution of EXPIII _ Environment effect"
date: 
    "June 30th, 2024"
author:  
    "Ali Movasati"  
output:  
    html_document:
        #css: style.css
        toc: true
        toc_depth: 2
        toc_float: true
        number_sections: true
        theme: lumen
        highlight: zenburn
        code_folding: hide
        code_download: true # to make the Rmd source code available
---




```{r loading libraries, echo=FALSE}

# loading libraries
library("ggplot2")
library("ggpubr")
library("plotly")
library("reshape2")
library("ggvenn")
library("hrbrthemes")
library("DT")
library("dplyr")
library("tidyr")
library("Biostrings")
library("stringr")
library("magrittr")
library("rstatix")
library("effsize")
library("coda")


```


```{r read-in the data}

# determine the server path

if (file.exists("/home/amovas/")){
  print("Remote HPC Connection!")
  wd <- "/home/amovas/data/genome-evo-proj/"
} else {
  print("Local PC Connection!")
  wd <- "/Users/alimos313/Documents/studies/phd/hpc-research/genome-evo-proj/"
}

# load data
variants_ann <- read.table(file = paste0(wd, "results/tables/pipeline-outputs/all_annotated_variants.tsv.gz"), 
sep = "\t", stringsAsFactors = FALSE, header = TRUE)


# correct for the switched experimental lines
variants_ann$exp_line[variants_ann$exp_line == 15 & variants_ann$passage > 360] <- "A"
variants_ann$exp_line[variants_ann$exp_line == 16 & variants_ann$passage > 360] <- "B"

variants_ann$exp_line[variants_ann$exp_line == "A"] <- "16"
variants_ann$exp_line[variants_ann$exp_line == "B"] <- "15"


# only keep the EXPIII data
exp <- "EXPIII"
end_psg <- 500

variants_ann_expiii <- variants_ann %>% filter(exp_line %in% 13:16,
        passage <= end_psg) 

# facors

host_factor <- c("MT-2", "MT-4")
exp_line_factor <- c("MT-2_1", "MT-2_2", "MT-4_1", "MT-4_2")

translational_impacts <- c("U", "S", "N")
gene_factor <- c("gag", "pol", "vif", "vpr", "tat", "rev", "vpu", "envelope", "nef")
feature_factor <- c("5utr", "gag", "pol", "vif", "vpr", "tat1", "rev1", "vpu", "envelope", "tat2", "rev2", "nef", "3utr")

# format the dataframe
variants_ann_expiii <- variants_ann_expiii %>%
                            mutate(host_line = ifelse(exp_line %in% c("13", "14"), "MT2", "MT4"), # set host cell line info
                            exp_line = case_when(exp_line==13 ~ "MT-2_1", exp_line==14 ~ "MT-2_2", exp_line==15 ~ "MT-4_1", exp_line==16 ~ "MT-4_2"), # update exp line labels
                            mut_info = paste(genomic_pos, ref_allele, alt_allele, sep = "_")) %>% 
                            mutate(effect_simplified = case_when(effect == "synonymous_variant" ~ "S", effect == "untranslated_region" ~ "U")) %>%
                            mutate(effect_simplified = replace_na(effect_simplified, "N")) %>%
                            mutate(passage = as.factor(passage),
                            exp_line = factor(exp_line, levels = exp_line_factor),
                            host_line = factor(host_line, levels = host_factor),
                            effect_simplified = factor(effect_simplified, levels = translational_impacts)) 

# remove duplicate records for the same variants
variants_expiii <- variants_ann_expiii %>% filter(!duplicated(variant_id))




# Visual settings

line_palette <- c("#ff00ff", "#ff2400", "#6600cc", "#0000ff")
breaks_step <- 50
line_labels <- c("MT-2_1", "MT-2_2", "MT-4_1", "MT-4_2")


```





```{r set parameters}

# set parameters
category <- "Fixed"

if (category == "Sporadic"){
    min_threshold <- 0.01
    max_threshold <- 0.05
} else if (category == "Minority"){
    min_threshold <- 0.05
    max_threshold <- 0.5
} else if (category == "Majority"){
    min_threshold <- 0.5
    max_threshold <- 1.01
} else if (category == "Fixed"){
    min_threshold <- 0.99
    max_threshold <- 1.01
}

```


```{r venn diagram}


end_fixed <- 
        variants_expiii %>%
        filter(allele_freq >= min_threshold, allele_freq < max_threshold, passage == end_psg) %>%
        select(c(exp_line,mut_info)) %>%
        distinct()

nrow(end_fixed)

# percentage of line specific mutations
sum(rowSums(as.matrix(table(end_fixed$mut_info, end_fixed$exp_line))) == 1)/length(rowSums(as.matrix(table(end_fixed$mut_info, end_fixed$exp_line))))
sum(rowSums(as.matrix(table(end_fixed$mut_info, end_fixed$exp_line))) == 2)/length(rowSums(as.matrix(table(end_fixed$mut_info, end_fixed$exp_line))))
sum(rowSums(as.matrix(table(end_fixed$mut_info, end_fixed$exp_line))) == 3)/length(rowSums(as.matrix(table(end_fixed$mut_info, end_fixed$exp_line))))
sum(rowSums(as.matrix(table(end_fixed$mut_info, end_fixed$exp_line))) == 4)/length(rowSums(as.matrix(table(end_fixed$mut_info, end_fixed$exp_line))))


#table(as.numeric(table(par$mut_info)))


# create a named vector from the df
muts <- end_fixed$mut_info
names(muts) <- end_fixed$exp_line

# convert named vector to list
muts_list <- lapply(split(muts, names(muts)), unname)


# visualization
fig <- ggvenn(muts_list, text_size = 9, fill_color = c("#ff00ff", "#ff2400", "#6600cc", "#0000ff"), set_name_size = 10) +
        labs(title = paste0(category, " Mutations at Transfer #", end_psg, "\n"))+
        scale_fill_manual(labels = line_labels, values = line_palette) +
        theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 40, hjust = 0.5))


# save figure
date <- str_split(Sys.time(), pattern = " ")[[1]][1]
fig_dir <- paste0(wd, "results/figs/publication/expiii/provisional/", date, "/")
ifelse(!dir.exists(file.path(fig_dir)), dir.create(file.path(fig_dir)), FALSE)
pdf(file = paste0(fig_dir, "parallel_venn.pdf"), height = 14, width = 14)
fig
dev.off()

```


```{r}



# Number of iterations
num_simulations <- 1000

# Store results
results <- data.frame(Shared_MT2 = numeric(num_simulations),
                      Shared_MT4 = numeric(num_simulations),
                      Shared_Both = numeric(num_simulations),
                      Unique_MT2 = numeric(num_simulations),
                      Unique_MT4 = numeric(num_simulations))

# Run the process 1000 times
for (i in 1:num_simulations) {
  
  # Shuffle names
  muts_vec <- unlist(muts_list)
  names(muts_vec) <- sample(rep(names(muts_list), lengths(muts_list)))
  
  # Convert back to list
  muts_list_new <- split(muts_vec, names(muts_vec))
  
  # Calculate mutation categories
  shared_mt2 <- intersect(muts_list_new[[1]], muts_list_new[[2]])
  shared_mt4 <- intersect(muts_list_new[[3]], muts_list_new[[4]])
  shared_both <- intersect(c(muts_list_new[[1]], muts_list_new[[2]]), 
                           c(muts_list_new[[3]], muts_list_new[[4]]))
  unique_mt2 <- setdiff(setdiff(c(muts_list_new[[1]], muts_list_new[[2]]), 
                                c(muts_list_new[[3]], muts_list_new[[4]])), 
                        shared_mt2)
  unique_mt4 <- setdiff(setdiff(c(muts_list_new[[3]], muts_list_new[[4]]), 
                                c(muts_list_new[[1]], muts_list_new[[2]])), 
                        shared_mt4)
  
  # Store results
  results[i, ] <- c(length(shared_mt2), length(shared_mt4), length(shared_both), 
                     length(unique_mt2), length(unique_mt4))
}

# Assuming your simulated results are stored in 'results' (a matrix or data frame)
hpd_results <- apply(results, 2, function(x) HPDinterval(as.mcmc(x), prob = 0.95))

# Extract lower and upper bounds for the HPD intervals
hpd_lower <- as.integer(hpd_results[1,]) # Lower bounds
hpd_upper <- as.integer(hpd_results[2,]) # Upper bounds


```

```{r}


# Step 1: Compute Original Mutation Counts
original_shared_mt2 <- intersect(muts_list[[1]], muts_list[[2]])
original_shared_mt4 <- intersect(muts_list[[3]], muts_list[[4]])
original_shared_both <- intersect(c(muts_list[[1]], muts_list[[2]]), 
                                  c(muts_list[[3]], muts_list[[4]]))
original_unique_mt2 <- setdiff(setdiff(c(muts_list[[1]], muts_list[[2]]), 
                                       c(muts_list[[3]], muts_list[[4]])), 
                               original_shared_mt2)
original_unique_mt4 <- setdiff(setdiff(c(muts_list[[3]], muts_list[[4]]), 
                                       c(muts_list[[1]], muts_list[[2]])), 
                               original_shared_mt4)

original_counts <- c(length(original_shared_mt2), length(original_shared_mt4), 
                     length(original_shared_both), length(original_unique_mt2), 
                     length(original_unique_mt4))

# Step 2: Prepare Data for Plotting
comparison_df <- data.frame(
  Category = factor(
    c("Shared in MT-2", "Shared in MT-4", "Shared in both", "Unique to MT-2", "Unique to MT-4"),
    levels = c("Shared in MT-2", "Shared in MT-4", "Shared in both", "Unique to MT-2", "Unique to MT-4")  # Explicit order
  ),
  Type = rep(c("Original", "Simulated"), each = 5),  # Labels for grouping
  Count = c(original_counts, colMeans(results)),  # Combine original and simulated means
  SE = c(rep(NA, 5), apply(results, 2, function(x) sd(x) / sqrt(length(x)))),  # Standard Error for Simulated
  HPD_Lower = c(rep(NA, 5), hpd_lower),  # HPD Lower only for Simulated
  HPD_Upper = c(rep(NA, 5), hpd_upper)   # HPD Upper only for Simulated
)
# Step 3: Plot with HPD Interval
dodge <- position_dodge(width=0.5)

fig <- ggplot(comparison_df, aes(x = Category, y = Count, fill = Type, group = Type)) +
    geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = dodge, width = 0.5) +  # Increased dodge width
    geom_errorbar( 
        aes(ymin = Count - SE, ymax = Count + SE),
        width = 0.2,  # Narrower error bars
        position = dodge,  # Match the dodge width exactly
        size = 1) +  
    labs(title = "Comparison of Observed vs Randomized Variant Counts\n Sharedness per Environment",
        x = "Sharedness Category",
        y = "Fixed Variant Count",
        fill = "Dataset") +
    scale_fill_manual(labels = c("Observed", "Randomized"), values = c("#038331", "#ffdf50")) +
    theme_bw() +
    theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 30, hjust = 0.5),
        axis.title = element_text(size = 25),
        axis.text.x = element_text(size = 20, angle = 90),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 20),
        legend.title = element_text(size=20),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 15))


# save figure
date <- str_split(Sys.time(), pattern = " ")[[1]][1]
fig_dir <- paste0(wd, "results/figs/publication/expiii/provisional/", date, "/")
ifelse(!dir.exists(file.path(fig_dir)), dir.create(file.path(fig_dir)), FALSE)
pdf(file = paste0(fig_dir, "environment_randomized_parallel.pdf"), height = 14, width = 14)
fig
dev.off()
```
